ohtani.title: Mookie Betts hits a go-ahead single in Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Mookie Betts hits a go-ahead single and Roki Sasaki strikes out five in the Dodgers' 4-3 win over the Rockies\n

imanaga.title: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run fuels Cardinals' win
imanaga.blurb: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run and Kyle Leahy's six strikeouts fuel Cardinals' 3-0 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Jeremiah Jackson's clutch double lifts Orioles to win
suzuki.blurb: Jeremiah Jackson hits a pinch-hit two-run double in the 8th and Trevor Rogers pitches six strong innings in the Orioles' 3-2 win

yoshida.title: Jake Bennett's strong start fuels Red Sox in win
yoshida.blurb: Jake Bennett tosses seven-scoreless innings to power the Red Sox in 5-0 win against the White Sox

okamoto.title: Dylan Cease flirts with no-hitter in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Dylan Cease takes a no-hitter into the 9th inning and Kazuma Okamoto hits a grand slam in the Blue Jays' 10-0 win over the Giants

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Merrill Kelly's strong start leads D-backs in win
matsui.blurb: Merrill Kelly strikes out six in seven innings to power the D-backs' 3-1 win over the Padres
